rl_limit_legend: 0 = closed; -1 = unlimited. Approval threshold cannot exceed single tx limit (except unlimited tx).
rl_monotonic_info: Higher risk = stricter limits; global row is the most permissive ceiling (tightens Low → Critical).

rl_global_cap: Class limit cannot exceed global ceiling
rl_monotonic: Monotonic rule violation between risk classes
rl_approval_exceeds: Approval threshold exceeds single tx limit
rl_monthly_lt_daily: Monthly limit cannot be less than daily

cfe_no_base_tier: Base tier (lower limit 0, all countries) not found.

agg_code_format: Group code must use uppercase letters, digits, and underscores.

aga_hint: An agent can have only one active group. Removed agents are assigned to the default group.
aga_already_in_group: Agent is already in this group.
aga_remove_confirm: Remove {{name}} from group and assign to default?

afee_search_ph: Search group code, transaction or currency…

afee_passive_group: Cannot define tariff for passive group.
afee_lower_limit_min: Lower limit must be 0 or greater.
afee_base_tier_required: Each group/transaction/currency requires at least one active base tariff (Lower Limit=0).
afee_no_matching_tier: No matching tier for transaction amount.

afee_conflict_hint: An active record exists for the same combination and lower limit; the current tariff will be passivated after save.
